hero.sub: Service orders, customers, parts, commissions, and quotes sent to your customer's WhatsApp in seconds — no notebooks, no spreadsheets.
hero.foot: No credit card • Email activation • Made in Mexico

features.title: Everything your shop needs, in one place
features.sub: MotoPartes centralizes a motorcycle shop's daily operations — from the moment you receive the bike to the moment you send the PDF receipt.

pricing.title: Simple pricing per shop
pricing.sub: Start for free. Upgrade as your shop grows. Cancel whenever you want.
pricing.note: All paid plans include a 14-day free trial with every Pro feature. Prices in MXN (VAT not included).

origin.title: The platform MotoPartes uses every day — now available for your shop.
origin.sub: MotoPartes wasn't designed in a cubicle. It started in a shop that got tired of tracking orders on paper and built the solution you can use today.
origin.metric_orders: orders per month already handled without paper
origin.metric_tracked: of payments tracked in the system
origin.quote: "If we ditched the notebook for good, your shop can too."

cta_final.title: Take your shop to the next level
cta_final.sub: Create your account today — we'll email you when your shop is activated.
